name: ST JOE Co
summary: The St. Joe Company is a diversified real estate development, asset management, and operating company incorporated in Florida in 1936. It owns approximately 165,000 acres in Northwest Florida and operates across three segments: residential (homesite development and sales), hospitality (hotels, Watersound Club, vacation rentals, marinas, food and beverage), and commercial (multi-family, senior living, self-storage, medical, office, retail, industrial leasing, and timber management). It also operates real estate brokerage, title insurance, and insurance agency businesses.

products.name: Residential Homesites
products.description: Development and sale of homesites in multiple communities, primarily to homebuilders.

products.name: Watersound Club
products.description: Exclusive membership club offering access to golf courses, beach club, and recreational amenities.

products.name: Hotel Portfolio
products.description: Portfolio of hotels ranging from luxury boutique properties to branded hotels in Northwest Florida.

products.name: Gulf-Front Vacation Rentals
products.description: Gulf-front vacation rental properties operated as part of the hospitality segment.

products.name: Commercial Leasing
products.description: Ownership, development, and leasing of multi-family, senior living, self-storage, medical, office, retail, and industrial properties.

products.name: Timber Management
products.description: Growing and selling pulpwood, sawtimber, and other timber products from land holdings.

products.name: Real Estate Brokerage
products.description: Real estate brokerage, title insurance agency, and insurance agency operations.

products.name: Latitude Margaritaville Watersound
products.description: Approximately 3,700-home active adult residential development operated through an unconsolidated joint venture.

partnerships.description: Unconsolidated joint venture developing and selling homes in an approximately 3,700-home active adult residential community.
